Female: A photo of a female pedestrian.
AgeOver60: A photo of an elderly pedestrian who appears to be over 60 years old.
Age18-60: A photo of an adult pedestrian between the ages of 18 and 60.
AgeLess18: A photo of a young pedestrian who is a child or teenager under 18 years old.
Front: A photo showing the front view of a pedestrian facing the camera.
Side: A photo showing the side profile view of a pedestrian.
Back: A photo showing the back view of a pedestrian walking away from the camera.
Hat: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a hat, cap, or head covering.
Glasses: A photo of a pedestrian wearing glasses or eyewear on their face.
HandBag: A photo of a pedestrian carrying a handbag or small bag in their hand.
ShoulderBag: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a shoulder bag with a strap over their shoulder.
Backpack: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a backpack on their back.
HoldObjectsInFront: A photo of a pedestrian holding an object or bag in front of their body.
ShortSleeve: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a short-sleeved top or shirt.
LongSleeve: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a long-sleeved top, shirt, or sweater.
UpperStride: A photo of a pedestrian wearing an upper garment with a striped pattern.
UpperLogo: A photo of a pedestrian wearing an upper garment with a visible logo or graphic.
UpperPlaid: A photo of a pedestrian wearing an upper garment with a plaid or checkered pattern.
UpperSplice: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a multi-colored, color-blocked, or spliced upper garment.
LowerStripe: A photo of a pedestrian wearing lower body clothing with a striped pattern.
LowerPattern: A photo of a pedestrian wearing lower body clothing with a visible pattern or print.
LongCoat: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a long coat that extends below the waist.
Trousers: A photo of a pedestrian wearing full-length trousers or pants.
Shorts: A photo of a pedestrian wearing shorts.
Skirt&Dress: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a skirt or a dress.
boots: A photo of a pedestrian wearing boots on their feet.
